agq_v3a.method: PCA equal weights (eigenvalues nearly equal, n=357)

agq_v3b.method: PCA equal weights, A replaced by NS_depth (n=28)
agq_v3b.note: NS_depth has correct direction Java+Python but weak in Python

pca_finding: All 5 eigenvalues nearly equal — PCA yields uniform 0.20 weights. No dominant dimension in feature space. This means no combination of M/A/S/C/CD dominates in pure variance terms.
